title: Currently in Production variables: - name: prod source: kind: run select: latest id: currently-in-production type: html - content: dataSource: kind: runs limit: 999 render: columns: - field: '{{ substring(payload.data.after, 0, 8) }}' format: code label: Version - field: '{{ firstLine(payload.data.head_commit.message) }}' format: link href: '{{ payload.data.head_commit.url }}' label: Name - field: payload.data.head_commit.author.name label: Deployed by - field: durationMs format: duration label: Duration - field: finishedAt format: relative label: Deployed - field: '{{ status == "passed" ? "deployed" : status }}' format: badge label: Status kind: table rowStyles: - field: status op: eq tone: green value: passed - field: status op: eq tone: red value: failed sort: field: createdAt order: desc where: - field: rootEvent.nodeId op: eq value: github-onpush-github-onpush-10mw0f title: Deployments id: deployments type: table - content: dataSource: kind: runs limit: 100 render: filters: - rootEvent.nodeId == "github-onpush-github-onpush-10mw0f" kind: chart legend: hide series: - field: durationMs format: duration label: Duration sort: field: createdAt order: asc type: bar xField: createdAt title: Deployment duration id: deployment-duration-chart type: chart - content: dataSource: kind: runs limit: 100 render: aggregation: avg field: durationMs filters: - rootEvent.nodeId == "github-onpush-github-onpush-10mw0f" format: duration kind: number label: AVERAGE title: Avg deployment duration id: avg-deployment-duration type: number - content: dataSource: kind: runs limit: 1000 render: aggregation: count filters: - rootEvent.nodeId == "github-onpush-github-onpush-10mw0f" kind: number label: LAST 7 DAYS suffix: ' deployments' title: Deployments id: deployments-last-7-days type: number
